expected_behavior: Report the one-turn two-chain as a sub-chain.
Keep the two-turn three-chain as the main chain.
results.name: short_tactical_sub_chain_keeps_main_distinct
non_goals: Do not choose whether the manager should fire the sub-chain.
results.situation: A two-chain attack is available now while the larger three-chain main line needs the visible NEXT.

expected_behavior: Report a one-turn immediate attack.
Do not relabel equivalent rush routes as sub-chains.
results.name: immediate_rush_is_not_sub_chain
non_goals: Do not judge whether rushing is strategically correct.
results.situation: The current pair immediately fires the best two-chain attack from a shallow rush shape.

expected_behavior: Select the maximum three-chain candidate as main.
Expose smaller attacks separately.
results.name: largest_chain_is_selected_as_main
non_goals: Do not prescribe a placement from the main-chain label.
results.situation: The search contains immediate two-chains and a larger three-chain reachable with NEXT.

expected_behavior: Return no main-chain candidate and no attack options.
results.name: no_chain_within_visible_horizon
non_goals: Do not extrapolate beyond current plus two NEXT pairs.
results.situation: An empty opening with six differently distributed colors cannot clear within the three visible pairs.

expected_behavior: Report only the added ignition cell as trigger_cells.
Retain the complete first-chain vanish group separately.
results.name: trigger_cell_is_the_added_ignition_puyo
non_goals: Do not call every vanished cell a trigger cell.
results.situation: One added red at (0,1) completes a four-red group on the bottom row.

expected_behavior: Report no trigger or attack candidate.
results.name: matching_color_without_group_is_not_trigger
non_goals: Do not infer ignition from color availability alone.
results.situation: A lone red exists, but visible pairs cannot form a four-puyo group in the search horizon.

expected_behavior: Mark cancellation possible without a counter surplus.
results.name: deadline_one_exact_cancel
non_goals: Do not decide whether preserving the chain is preferable.
results.situation: Five ojama arrive after one move and an immediate two-chain returns exactly five.

expected_behavior: Mark both cancellation and a two-ojama return surplus possible.
results.name: deadline_one_counter_surplus
non_goals: Do not choose the counter tactic.
results.situation: Three ojama arrive after one move while the immediate return is five.

expected_behavior: Report cancellation failure and an exact one-ojama deficit.
results.name: deadline_one_return_is_insufficient
non_goals: Do not estimate survival after the ojama lands.
results.situation: Six ojama arrive after one move while the best immediate return is five.

expected_behavior: Use attacks reachable by the second move when checking cancellation.
results.name: deadline_two_uses_next_pair
non_goals: Do not require an immediate response when the packet deadline is two.
results.situation: Ten ojama arrive in two moves; immediate fire returns six, while NEXT completes a 22-ojama main chain.

expected_behavior: Use the full three-pair horizon and report exact cancellation.
results.name: deadline_three_uses_second_next
non_goals: Do not report the response as immediate.
results.situation: One ojama arrives in three moves; only the second NEXT contains the red needed to cross 70 points with carry.

expected_behavior: Evaluate cumulative amount due independently at deadlines one and three.
Avoid applying the earliest deadline to all fifteen ojama.
results.name: mixed_incoming_packets_keep_deadlines_separate
non_goals: Do not model the manager's exact cancellation sequence.
results.situation: Three ojama arrive after one move and another twelve after three moves.

expected_behavior: Generate zero ojama and carry all 40 points.
results.name: score_total_40_keeps_carry
non_goals: Do not round a sub-70 score up to one ojama.
results.situation: A four-puyo clear earns 40 points with no prior carry.

expected_behavior: Generate zero ojama and retain carry 69.
results.name: score_total_69_stays_below_boundary
non_goals: Do not discard the remainder.
results.situation: A 40-point clear combines with 29 carried points for a total of 69.

expected_behavior: Generate one ojama with zero carry.
results.name: score_total_70_converts_exactly
non_goals: Do not double-count the prior carry.
results.situation: A 40-point clear combines with 30 carried points for exactly 70.

expected_behavior: Generate one ojama and retain carry 1.
results.name: score_total_71_retains_one
non_goals: Do not lose the point above the conversion boundary.
results.situation: A 40-point clear combines with 31 carried points for a total of 71.

expected_behavior: Use the full chain-end score delta and generate one ojama.
results.name: inter_chain_points_cross_boundary
non_goals: Do not use only the placement-local 40-point score.
results.situation: Thirty points earned since the previous chain end combine with the next 40-point clear.

expected_behavior: Report board_empty while all-clear event and bonus flags remain false.
results.name: initial_empty_board_has_no_all_clear_event
non_goals: Do not treat initial emptiness as an achieved all clear.
results.situation: The game begins on an empty board without a resolved chain.

expected_behavior: Keep own and opponent all-clear state independent.
results.name: own_all_clear_state_is_independent
non_goals: Do not infer opponent state from an equally empty board.
results.situation: Only the own player has just resolved an all clear and holds the pending bonus.

expected_behavior: Report the opponent event without changing own flags.
results.name: opponent_all_clear_state_is_independent
non_goals: Do not collapse both players into one board-empty flag.
results.situation: Only the opponent has just resolved an all clear and holds the pending bonus.

expected_behavior: Keep the input bonus pending and report no immediate consumption candidate.
results.name: pending_bonus_survives_non_clearing_turn
non_goals: Do not consume the bonus on a placement without a chain.
results.situation: An all-clear bonus is pending, but current and visible NEXT cannot clear anything.

expected_behavior: Apply 2100 bonus points once and expose the consumed transition.
results.name: pending_bonus_is_consumed_by_next_chain
non_goals: Do not require another all clear to consume the pending bonus.
results.situation: A pending all-clear bonus precedes a 40-point single-chain clear that leaves one blue behind.

expected_behavior: Expose the consumed snapshot and omit the 2100 bonus from later candidates.
results.name: consumed_bonus_is_not_applied_again
non_goals: Do not keep a consumed bonus pending.
results.situation: The previous chain consumed the all-clear bonus; a later 40-point clear starts with carry 40.

expected_behavior: Mark the candidate as a newly achieved all clear with a pending bonus.
results.name: forecast_marks_new_all_clear_event
non_goals: Do not apply the newly earned bonus to the same chain.
results.situation: Two red puyos from the current pair clear the existing three reds and empty the board.
